shopping_267.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The objective was to add "the RGB headset" to the cart and proceed to checkout. The agent successfully added an RGB headset and navigated to the final checkout screen. However, the cart contained 4 items, implying that other items were present in the cart before the task began or were added unintentionally. The task likely implicitly required only the specified RGB headset to be in the cart.
shopping_267.REFLECTION: When an objective requires adding a specific item to the cart and proceeding to checkout, always verify the cart contents. If the cart is not empty at the start of the task, or if the objective implies only the specified item should be present, clear any pre-existing items before adding the target item to ensure a clean and accurate transaction.
